methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.table_view.TableView._column_iterator
documentation:
Iterates table over specified column from row_start to row_end (defaults to table size).
Cells for which cell_filter returns False are ignored.

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.table_view.TableView._row_iterator
documentation:
Iterates table over specified row from column_start to column_end (defaults to table size).
Cells on which cell_filter returns False are ignored.

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTIETableNode.table_name
documentation: get name of table

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTIETableNode.columns_meta
documentation: get meta-information for all columns

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTIETableNode.with_table_name
documentation:
set specified name for table
\:param table_name: table name
\:return: new table content with specified table name
methods for table modifier

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTIETableNode.with_columns_meta
documentation:
set meta-information for specified columns
\:param meta: dict 'row_index'->'meta' with meta-information to be added to columns.
\:return: new table content with specified columns meta

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.table_node
documentation: get table node

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.document
documentation: get Talisman document

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.table_structure
documentation: get table structure in form of matrix

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.columns_number
documentation: get number of columns

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.rows_number
documentation: get number of rows

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.header_indices
documentation:
get indices of header rows
\:return: table header rows ordered top-to-bottom

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.header
documentation:
get table header rows
\:return: tuple of rows, each row is tuple of cells content

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.column
documentation:
get column cells for specified index. This method could include or exclude header cells from result
\:param column: target cell column index in range \[0; columns_number)
\:param include_header: flag to include or exclude header cells from result
\:return: table cells content ordered top-to-bottom

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.row
documentation:
get row cells for specified row index
\:param row: target cell row index in range \[0; rows_number)
\:return: table cells content ordered left-to-right

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.cell
documentation:
get cell content by row and column number
\:param row: target cell row index in range \[0; rows_number)
\:param column: target cell column index in range \[0; columns_number)
\:return: content contained in specified cell

methods.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.node.table.abstract.AbstractTableView.with_header
documentation:
set specified rows as header
\:param rows: iterable of header rows indices
\:return: new table content with specified rows marked as header

classes.name: tie_datamodel.datamodel.container.LazyEvalWrapper
documentation:
Straight clear version of cached property. Can be used with __slots__-containing classes.
func, *args, **kwargs references are hold until .value is requested and initialized.

*args and **kwargs can be specified in __init__ to make LazyEvalWrapper picklable (if func, *args, **kwargs are picklable).

classes.name: tie_datamodel.readers.rueval.RuevalReader
documentation:
Right now this reader will read only coreference chain content from the RuEval corpus -
more functionality to be added as necessary

methods.name: tie_datamodel.readers.tacred.TACREDDocumentReader._convert_to_doc
documentation:
Each document is one sentence with 2 entities and relation between them.
All documents in raw_docs has same tokens and sentences but different entities and relations

methods.name: tie_datamodel.readers.docred.DocREDReader.__init__
documentation:
---
param delete_duplicate_facts: should to delete duplicate ner facts
param path_to_file: path to dataset file
param path_to_rel_info: path to rel_info.json file for matching relation Wikidata
  ID's to relation names
---

methods.name: tie_datamodel.readers.docred.DocREDReader._build_links
documentation:
NOTE: Relations can be between different sets of source and target entity types. To meet requirements of domain we construct
unique relation type ids for them.
